series_metadata.series_description: Fictitious registrations are issued for unmarked vehicles used only for investigation and surveillance undercover work. The registration is generated when new, transfer, replacement or renewal plates are issued on commercial/non-commercial truck, passenger vehicles, motor homes, motorcycles, trailers, etc. Fictitious plate registration applications are filed as new, transfer, replacement, or renewal. The registration contains: License plate number, fictitious name and address, actual vehicle year, make, type, serial number, title number, odometer reading, purchase date, issuance date, expiration date, tax district, fictitious county code, old application number, new application number, fictitious deputy name, agency number, and location. The application contains: Fictitious name and address, vehicle year, make, type, serial number and title number.
